name: Introduction
description: Improvements needed for the introduction section of the dissertation.

items.content: Explicitly state the research gap more clearly
Identify gap: limited long-term monitoring of water hyacinth dynamics using multi-sensor satellite data
Identify gap: limited comparisons between threshold-based and machine learning classifiers for floating vegetation detection
Identify gap: limited understanding of hydroclimatic drivers of hyacinth expansion
Explicitly explain how the dissertation addresses each identified gap
Add 1–2 sentences linking the research gap to the research questions

name: Research Questions
description: Refinements needed for the research questions section.

items.content: Add justification for the 2015–2025 time period (Sentinel-2 archive begins 2015)
Note that Sentinel-1 provides consistent SAR coverage over the study period
Note that the period enables decadal-scale analysis of invasion dynamics
Refine wording for clarity and specificity — refer to spatial extent or temporal variability of hyacinth
Consider adding a third methodological research question comparing classification methods (optional)

name: Study Site Justification
description: This section is currently missing — add ~100 words explaining why the Winam Gulf is appropriate.

items.content: Describe the history of severe water hyacinth invasions in the Winam Gulf
Explain the sheltered hydrodynamic conditions that allow floating plants to accumulate
Note the importance of Lake Victoria for regional fisheries and livelihoods
Reference evidence of nutrient enrichment and anthropogenic pressure
Confirm availability of remote sensing and environmental datasets for the site

name: Methods – Data and Pre-processing
description: Clarifications needed in the data and pre-processing section.

items.content: Briefly justify why Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 together provide complementary capabilities
Clarify whether data will be composited monthly, seasonally, or per scene
Briefly explain why NDVI, NDMI, and AWEI were selected as indices

name: Methods – Random Forest Classifier
description: Replace the JUSTIFICATION FOR INCLUSION OF RANDOM FOREST placeholder with a proper rationale.

items.content: Explain that Random Forest handles non-linear relationships in remote sensing data
Note that it performs well with high-dimensional spectral features
Note that it is robust to noise and overfitting
Cite its widespread use in land-cover and vegetation classification studies

name: Methods – Accuracy Assessment
description: Clarify the validation methodology and revise evaluation metrics.

items.content: Specify how training and validation data will be split (e.g. 70/30 split)
State whether cross-validation will be used
Describe the number or type of validation points if known
Include Overall Accuracy as an evaluation metric
Include User's Accuracy as an evaluation metric
Include Producer's Accuracy as an evaluation metric
Include F1-score as an evaluation metric
Include Kappa coefficient as an evaluation metric
Remove or justify RMSE and correlation — less standard for classification tasks

name: Methods – Environmental Drivers Analysis
description: Improve clarity of the modelling workflow.

items.content: Describe stage 1: exploratory correlation analysis
Describe stage 2: lagged correlation tests
Describe stage 3: variable selection using VIF or PCA
Describe stage 4: predictive modelling
Describe stage 5: model evaluation
Clarify temporal resolution of datasets (e.g. monthly aggregation)
Briefly explain why both statistical and machine learning models will be used

name: Figures and Workflow Diagrams
description: Figures are strong but could be better integrated into the text.

items.content: Add one explanatory sentence for each figure in the main text
Clarify how each workflow diagram supports the research questions
Ensure all figure captions clearly summarise what the diagram shows

name: Timeline Section
description: The timeline section is currently very minimal — expand and replace the placeholder Gantt chart caption.

items.content: Add sentences explaining the literature review and methodological design phase
Add sentences explaining the data acquisition and preprocessing phase
Add sentences explaining the classification and environmental modelling phase
Add sentences explaining the writing and revision phase
Replace the placeholder figure caption for the Gantt chart with a real caption

name: Literature and Referencing
description: Minor improvements to citations and the bibliography.

items.content: Add references supporting machine learning classification in remote sensing
Fill all placeholder citations marked as CITE
Check that every in-text citation appears in the bibliography

name: Writing and Clarity
description: General writing improvements to improve readability.

items.content: Remove all ***CITE*** placeholder markers
Remove all ***REASONS*** placeholder markers
Remove all ***JUSTIFICATION*** placeholder markers
Slightly reduce overly technical explanations where unnecessary
Ensure each paragraph has a clear topic sentence

name: Word Count Strategy
description: Use the remaining ~350 words to strengthen key areas.

items.content: Add ~150 words to the research gap section
Add ~100 words to the site justification section
Add ~80 words to the Random Forest justification
Add ~40 words to the timeline explanation
